'''旧暦3月19日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の19日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[天智天皇]]6年（[[667年]]_月_日） - 中大兄皇子（後の[[天智天皇]]）が近江・大津京に遷都 * [[正保]]元年（[[1644年]]_月_日） - [[李自成]]が率いる叛乱軍が北京を占領。[[崇禎帝]]が自害し[[明]]が滅亡 * [[明治]]3年（[[1870年]]_月_日） - 鉄道建設業務を統轄する為、民部・大蔵省に鉄道掛を設置
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]9年（[[1838年]]_月_日） - [[後藤象二郎]]、政治家・自由民権運動家（+ [[1897年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月18日 (旧暦)|3月18日]] 翌日[[3月20日 (旧暦)|3月20日]] - 前月[[2月19日 (旧暦)|2月19日]] 翌月[[4月19日 (旧暦)|4月19日]] *新暦[[3月19日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1838年]][[4月13日]]） - [[後藤象二郎]]、政治家・[[自由民権運動]]家（+ [[1897年]]）
== 忌日 == 曹仁（２２３年）、陸遜（２４５年）の忌日
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|18|3|20|2|19|4|3|0319}}

removing all the commented out stuff
I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it

revision.text:
[[sn:March 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] [[zh:三月十九]] [[en:draft:March 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[天智天皇]]6年（[[Julian Calendar]][[667]][[4月17日]]） 中大兄皇子（後の[[天智天皇]]）が近江・大津京に[[遷都]] * [[崇禎]]17年/[[順治]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1644]][[4月25日]]） - [[李自成]]が率いる叛乱軍が北京を占領。[[崇禎帝]]が自害し[[明]]が滅亡 * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870]][[4月19日]]） - [[鉄道]]建設業務を統轄する為、民部・大蔵省に[[日本の鉄道史|鉄道掛]]を設置
== Births == * [[天保]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1838]][[4月13日]]） - [[後藤象二郎]]、政治家・[[自由民権運動]]家（+ [[1897]]）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]]4年（ユリウス暦[[223]][[5月6日]]） - [[曹仁]]、武将（* [[168]]） * [[赤烏]]8年（ユリウス暦[[245]][[5月2日]]） - [[陸遜]]、武将、政治家（* [[183]]）

[[sn:March 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] [[zh:三月十九]] [[en:draft:March 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[天智天皇]]6年（[[Julian Calendar]][[667]][[4月17日]]） 中大兄皇子（後の[[天智天皇]]）が近江・大津京に[[遷都]] * [[崇禎]]17年/[[順治]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1644]][[4月25日]]） - [[李自成]]が率いる叛乱軍が北京を占領。[[崇禎帝]]が自害し[[明]]が滅亡 * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870]][[4月19日]]） - [[鉄道]]建設業務を統轄する為、民部・大蔵省に[[日本の鉄道史|鉄道掛]]を設置
== Births == * [[天保]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1838]][[4月13日]]） - [[後藤象二郎]]、政治家・[[自由民権運動]]家（+ [[1897]]）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]]4年（ユリウス暦[[223]][[5月6日]]） - [[曹仁]]、武将（* [[168]]） * [[赤烏]]8th year（ユリウス暦[[245]][[5月2日]]） - [[陸遜]]、武将、政治家（* [[183]]）

[[sn:March 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] [[zh:三月十九]] [[en:draft:March 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[天智天皇]]6th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[667]][[4月17日]]） 中大兄皇子（後の[[天智天皇]]）が近江・大津京に[[遷都]] * [[崇禎]]17年/[[順治]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1644]][[4月25日]]） - [[李自成]]が率いる叛乱軍が北京を占領。[[崇禎帝]]が自害し[[明]]が滅亡 * [[明治]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1870]][[4月19日]]） - [[鉄道]]建設業務を統轄する為、民部・大蔵省に[[日本の鉄道史|鉄道掛]]を設置
== Births == * [[天保]]9th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1838]][[4月13日]]） - [[後藤象二郎]]、政治家・[[自由民権運動]]家（+ [[1897]]）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]]4th year（ユリウス暦[[223]][[5月6日]]） - [[曹仁]]、武将（* [[168]]） * [[赤烏]]8th year（ユリウス暦[[245]][[5月2日]]） - [[陸遜]]、武将、政治家（* [[183]]）

revision.comment: translating this common phrase in them
revision.text:
[[sn:March 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] [[zh:三月十九]] [[en:draft:March 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[天智天皇]]6th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[667]][[4月17日]]） 中大兄皇子（後の[[天智天皇]]）が近江・大津京に[[遷都]] * [[崇禎]]17年/[[順治]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1644]][[4月25日]]） - [[李自成]]が率いる叛乱軍が北京を占領。[[崇禎帝]]が自害し[[明]]が滅亡 * [[明治]]3rd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1870]][[4月19日]]） - [[鉄道]]建設業務を統轄する為、民部・大蔵省に[[日本の鉄道史|鉄道掛]]を設置
== Births == * [[天保]]9th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1838]][[4月13日]]） - [[後藤象二郎]]、政治家・[[自由民権運動]]家（+ [[1897]]）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]]4th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[223]][[5月6日]]） - [[曹仁]]、武将（* [[168]]） * [[赤烏]]8th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[245]][[5月2日]]） - [[陸遜]]、武将、政治家（* [[183]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|18|3|20|2|19|4|3|0319}}

== Births == * [[天保]]9th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1838]][[4月13日]]） - [[後藤象二郎]]、政治家・[[自由民権運動]]家（+ [[1897]]）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]]4th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[223]][[5月6日]]） - [[曹仁]]、武将（* [[168]]） * [[赤烏]]8th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[245]][[5月2日]]） - [[陸遜]]、武将、政治家（* [[183]]）

[[sn:March 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] [[zh:三月十九]] [[en:draft:March 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 6th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[667]] [[4月17日]] ） 中大兄皇子（後の[[天智天皇]] ）が近江・大津京に[[遷都]] * [[崇禎]] 17年/[[順治]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1644]] [[4月25日]] ） - [[李自成]] が率いる叛乱軍が北京を占領。[[崇禎帝]] が自害し[[明]] が滅亡 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[4月19日]] ） - [[鉄道]] 建設業務を統轄する為、民部・大蔵省に[[日本の鉄道史|鉄道掛]] を設置
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1838]] [[4月13日]] ） - [[後藤象二郎]] 、政治家・[[自由民権運動]] 家（+ [[1897]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[223]] [[5月6日]] ） - [[曹仁]] 、武将（* [[168]] ） * [[赤烏]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[245]] [[5月2日]] ） - [[陸遜]] 、武将、政治家（* [[183]] ）

revision.comment: doing mass replacement for all western dates to english
revision.text:
[[sn:March 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] [[zh:三月十九]] [[en:draft:March 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 6th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[667]] [[April 17]] ） 中大兄皇子（後の[[天智天皇]] ）が近江・大津京に[[遷都]] * [[崇禎]] 17年/[[順治]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1644]] [[April 25]] ） - [[李自成]] が率いる叛乱軍が北京を占領。[[崇禎帝]] が自害し[[明]] が滅亡 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 19]] ） - [[鉄道]] 建設業務を統轄する為、民部・大蔵省に[[日本の鉄道史|鉄道掛]] を設置
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1838]] [[April 13]] ） - [[後藤象二郎]] 、政治家・[[自由民権運動]] 家（+ [[1897]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[223]] [[May 6]] ） - [[曹仁]] 、武将（* [[168]] ） * [[赤烏]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[245]] [[May 2]] ） - [[陸遜]] 、武将、政治家（* [[183]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|18|3|20|2|19|4|3|0319}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 6th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[667]] [[4月17日]] ） 中大兄皇子（後の[[天智天皇]] ）が近江・大津京に[[遷都]] * [[崇禎]] 17年/[[順治]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1644]] [[4月25日]] ） - [[李自成]] が率いる叛乱軍が北京を占領。[[崇禎帝]] が自害し[[明]] が滅亡 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[4月19日]] ） - [[鉄道]] 建設業務を統轄する為、民部・大蔵省に[[日本の鉄道史|鉄道掛]] を設置
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1838]] [[4月13日]] ） - [[後藤象二郎]] 、政治家・[[自由民権運動]] 家（+ [[1897]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[223]] [[5月6日]] ） - [[曹仁]] 、武将（* [[168]] ） * [[赤烏]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[245]] [[5月2日]] ） - [[陸遜]] 、武将、政治家（* [[183]] ）
== See Also ==

[[sn:March 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] [[zh:三月十九]] [[en:draft:March 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 6th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[667]] [[April 17]] ） 中大兄皇子（後の[[天智天皇]] ）が近江・大津京に[[遷都]] * [[崇禎]] 17年/[[順治]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1644]] [[April 25]] ） - [[李自成]] が率いる叛乱軍が北京を占領。[[崇禎帝]] が自害し[[明]] が滅亡 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 19]] ） - [[鉄道]] 建設業務を統轄する為、民部・大蔵省に[[日本の鉄道史|鉄道掛]] を設置
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1838]] [[April 13]] ） - [[後藤象二郎]] 、政治家・[[自由民権運動]] 家（+ [[1897]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[223]] [[May 6]] ） - [[曹仁]] 、武将（* [[168]] ） * [[赤烏]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[245]] [[May 2]] ） - [[陸遜]] 、武将、政治家（* [[183]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|18|3|20|2|19|4|3|0319}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|" to "{{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 19 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] [[zh:三月十九]] [[en:draft:March 19 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 6th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[667]] [[April 17]] ） 中大兄皇子（後の[[天智天皇]] ）が近江・大津京に[[遷都]] * [[崇禎]] 17年/[[順治]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1644]] [[April 25]] ） - [[李自成]] が率いる叛乱軍が北京を占領。[[崇禎帝]] が自害し[[明]] が滅亡 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 19]] ） - [[鉄道]] 建設業務を統轄する為、民部・大蔵省に[[日本の鉄道史|鉄道掛]] を設置
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1838]] [[April 13]] ） - [[後藤象二郎]] 、政治家・[[自由民権運動]] 家（+ [[1897]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[223]] [[May 6]] ） - [[曹仁]] 、武将（* [[168]] ） * [[赤烏]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[245]] [[May 2]] ） - [[陸遜]] 、武将、政治家（* [[183]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|18|3|20|2|19|4|3|0319}}

[[sn:March 19 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] [[zh:三月十九]] [[en:draft:March 19 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 6th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[667]] [[April 17]] ） 中大兄皇子（後の[[天智天皇]] ）が近江・大津京に[[遷都]] * [[崇禎]] 17年/[[順治]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1644]] [[April 25]] ） - [[李自成]] が率いる叛乱軍が北京を占領。[[崇禎帝]] が自害し[[明]] が滅亡 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 19]] ） - [[鉄道]] 建設業務を統轄する為、民部・大蔵省に[[日本の鉄道史|鉄道掛]] を設置
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1838]] [[April 13]] ） - [[後藤象二郎]] 、政治家・[[自由民権運動]] 家（+ [[1897]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[223]] [[May 6]] ） - [[曹仁]] 、武将（* [[168]] ） * [[赤烏]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[245]] [[May 2]] ） - [[陸遜]] 、武将、政治家（* [[183]] ）

[[sn:March 19 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] [[zh:三月十九]] [[en:draft:March 19 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 6th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[667]] [[April 17]] ） 中大兄皇子（後の[[天智天皇]] ）が近江・大津京に[[遷都]] * [[崇禎]] 17年/[[順治]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1644]] [[April 25]] ） - [[李自成]] が率いる叛乱軍が北京を占領。[[崇禎帝]] が自害し[[明]] が滅亡 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 19]] ） - [[鉄道]] 建設業務を統轄する為、民部・大蔵省に[[日本の鉄道史|鉄道掛]] を設置
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1838]] [[April 13]] ） - [[後藤象二郎]] 、政治家・[[自由民権運動]] 家（+ [[1897]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[223]] [[May 6]] ） - [[曹仁]] 、武将（* [[168]] ） * [[赤烏]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[245]] [[May 2]] ） - [[陸遜]] 、武将、政治家（* [[183]] ）

[[sn:March 19 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] [[zh:三月十九]] [[en:draft:March 19 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 6th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[667]] [[April 17]] ） 中大兄皇子（後の[[天智天皇]] ）が近江・大津京に[[Capital Relocation]] * [[崇禎]] 17年/[[順治]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1644]] [[April 25]] ） - [[李自成]] が率いる叛乱軍が北京を占領。[[崇禎帝]] が自害し[[明]] が滅亡 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 19]] ） - [[Railway]] 建設業務を統轄する為、民部・大蔵省に[[日本のRailway史|Railway掛]] を設置
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1838]] [[April 13]] ） - [[後藤象二郎]] 、政治家・[[自由民権運動]] 家（+ [[1897]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[223]] [[May 6]] ） - [[曹仁]] 、武将（* [[168]] ） * [[赤烏]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[245]] [[May 2]] ） - [[陸遜]] 、武将、政治家（* [[183]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|18|3|20|2|19|4|3|0319}}

[[sn:March 19 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] [[zh:三月十九]] [[en:draft:March 19 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 6th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[667]] [[April 17]] ） 中大兄皇子（後の[[天智天皇]] ）が近江・大津京に[[Capital Relocation]] * [[崇禎]] 17th year /[[順治]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1644]] [[April 25]] ） - [[李自成]] が率いる叛乱軍が北京を占領。[[崇禎帝]] が自害し[[明]] が滅亡 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 19]] ） - [[Railway]] 建設業務を統轄する為、民部・大蔵省に[[日本のRailway史|Railway掛]] を設置
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1838]] [[April 13]] ） - [[後藤象二郎]] 、政治家・[[自由民権運動]] 家（+ [[1897]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[223]] [[May 6]] ） - [[曹仁]] 、武将（* [[168]] ） * [[赤烏]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[245]] [[May 2]] ） - [[陸遜]] 、武将、政治家（* [[183]] ） == See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:March 19 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] [[zh:三月十九]] [[en:draft:March 19 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 6th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[667]] [[April 17]] ） 中大兄皇子（後の[[天智天皇]] ）が近江・大津京に[[Capital Relocation]] * [[崇禎]] 17th year /[[順治]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1644]] [[April 25]] ） - [[李自成]] が率いる叛乱軍が北京を占領。[[崇禎帝]] が自害し[[明]] が滅亡 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 19]] ） - [[Railway]] 建設業務を統轄する為、民部・大蔵省に[[日本のRailway史|Railway掛]] を設置
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1838]] [[April 13]] ） - [[後藤象二郎]] 、政治家・[[自由民権運動]] 家（+ [[1897]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[223]] [[May 6]] ） - [[曹仁]] 、武将（* [[168]] ） * [[赤烏]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[245]] [[May 2]] ） - [[陸遜]] 、武将、政治家（* [[183]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|18|3|20|2|19|4|3|0319}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 6th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[667]] [[April 17]] ） 中大兄皇子（後の[[天智天皇]] ）が近江・大津京に[[Capital Relocation]] * [[崇禎]] 17th year /[[順治]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1644]] [[April 25]] ） - [[李自成]] が率いる叛乱軍が北京を占領。[[崇禎帝]] が自害し[[明]] が滅亡 * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 19]] ） - [[Railway]] 建設業務を統轄する為、民部・大蔵省に[[日本のRailway史|Railway掛]] を設置
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1838]] [[April 13]] ） - [[後藤象二郎]] 、政治家・[[自由民権運動]] 家（+ [[1897]] ）
== Deaths == * [[黄初]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[223]] [[May 6]] ） - [[曹仁]] 、武将（* [[168]] ） * [[赤烏]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[245]] [[May 2]] ） - [[陸遜]] 、武将、政治家（* [[183]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|18|3|20|2|19|4|3|0319}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tianzhi Tennō|ja|天智天皇}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[667]] {{ill|April 17|ja|4月17日}}) – Prince Nakano-Ōe (later known as {{ill|Tianzhi Tennō|ja|天智天皇}}) relocated the capital to Ōmi and Ōtsu-kyō. * {{ill|Sūtei|ja|崇禎}} 17th year / {{ill|Shunji|ja|順治}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1644]] {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}}) – Rebel leader {{ill|Li Zicheng|ja|李自成}} led his forces to occupy Beijing; Emperor {{ill|Chongzhen|ja|崇禎帝}} committed suicide, marking the collapse of the Ming dynasty. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1870]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – To oversee railway construction, the Japanese government established the Railway Section within the Ministry of Civil Affairs and the Ministry of Finance.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1838]] {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日}}) – {{ill|Gotō Shōjirō|ja|後藤象二郎}}, a politician and prominent figure in the Freedom and People's Rights Movement (died [[1897]]).
== Deaths == * [[Huangchu]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[223]] {{ill|May 6|ja|5月6日}}) – {{ill|Cao Ren|ja|曹仁}}, a military commander from the Three Kingdoms period (born [[168]]). * [[Chiku]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[245]] {{ill|May 2|ja|5月2日}}) – {{ill|Lu Xun|ja|陸遜}}, a military commander and statesman (born [[183]]).

revision.text:
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tianzhi Tennō|ja|天智天皇|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[667]] {{ill|April 17|ja|4月17日|12=draft}}) – Prince Nakano-Ōe (later known as {{ill|Tianzhi Tennō|ja|天智天皇|12=draft}}) relocated the capital to Ōmi and Ōtsu-kyō. * {{ill|Sūtei|ja|崇禎|12=draft}} 17th year / {{ill|Shunji|ja|順治|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1644]] {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日|12=draft}}) – Rebel leader {{ill|Li Zicheng|ja|李自成|12=draft}} led his forces to occupy Beijing; Emperor {{ill|Chongzhen|ja|崇禎帝|12=draft}} committed suicide, marking the collapse of the Ming dynasty. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1870]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日|12=draft}}) – To oversee railway construction, the Japanese government established the Railway Section within the Ministry of Civil Affairs and the Ministry of Finance.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1838]] {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Gotō Shōjirō|ja|後藤象二郎|12=draft}}, a politician and prominent figure in the Freedom and People's Rights Movement (died [[1897]]).
== Deaths == * [[Huangchu]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[223]] {{ill|May 6|ja|5月6日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Cao Ren|ja|曹仁|12=draft}}, a military commander from the Three Kingdoms period (born [[168]]). * [[Chiku]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[245]] {{ill|May 2|ja|5月2日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Lu Xun|ja|陸遜|12=draft}}, a military commander and statesman (born [[183]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|18|3|20|2|19|4|3|0319}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]]

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tianzhi Tennō|ja|天智天皇|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[667]] {{ill|April 17|ja|4月17日|12=draft}}) – Prince Nakano-Ōe (later known as {{ill|Tianzhi Tennō|ja|天智天皇|12=draft}}) relocated the capital to Ōmi and Ōtsu-kyō. * {{ill|Sūtei|ja|崇禎|12=draft}} 17th year / {{ill|Shunji|ja|順治|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1644]] {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日|12=draft}}) – Rebel leader {{ill|Li Zicheng|ja|李自成|12=draft}} led his forces to occupy Beijing; Emperor {{ill|Chongzhen|ja|崇禎帝|12=draft}} committed suicide, marking the collapse of the Ming dynasty. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1870]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日|12=draft}}) – To oversee railway construction, the Japanese government established the Railway Section within the Ministry of Civil Affairs and the Ministry of Finance.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1838]] {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Gotō Shōjirō|ja|後藤象二郎|12=draft}}, a politician and prominent figure in the Freedom and People's Rights Movement (died [[1897]]).
== Deaths == * [[Huangchu]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[223]] {{ill|May 6|ja|5月6日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Cao Ren|ja|曹仁|12=draft}}, a military commander from the Three Kingdoms period (born [[168]]). * [[Chiku]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[245]] {{ill|May 2|ja|5月2日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Lu Xun|ja|陸遜|12=draft}}, a military commander and statesman (born [[183]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|18|3|20|2|19|4|3|0319}}

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十九]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tianzhi Tennō|ja|天智天皇|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[667]] {{ill|April 17|ja|4月17日|12=draft}}) – Prince Nakano-Ōe (later known as {{ill|Tianzhi Tennō|ja|天智天皇|12=draft}}) relocated the capital to Ōmi and Ōtsu-kyō. * {{ill|Sūtei|ja|崇禎|12=draft}} 17th year / {{ill|Shunji|ja|順治|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1644]] {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日|12=draft}}) – Rebel leader {{ill|Li Zicheng|ja|李自成|12=draft}} led his forces to occupy Beijing; Emperor {{ill|Chongzhen|ja|崇禎帝|12=draft}} committed suicide, marking the collapse of the Ming dynasty. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1870]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日|12=draft}}) – To oversee railway construction, the Japanese government established the Railway Section within the Ministry of Civil Affairs and the Ministry of Finance.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1838]] {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Gotō Shōjirō|ja|後藤象二郎|12=draft}}, a politician and prominent figure in the Freedom and People's Rights Movement (died [[1897]]).
== Deaths == * [[Huangchu]] 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[223]] {{ill|May 6|ja|5月6日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Cao Ren|ja|曹仁|12=draft}}, a military commander from the Three Kingdoms period (born [[168]]). * [[Chiku]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[245]] {{ill|May 2|ja|5月2日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Lu Xun|ja|陸遜|12=draft}}, a military commander and statesman (born [[183]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|18|3|20|2|19|4|3|0319}}

revision.text:
{{出典の明記|date=2013年6月3日 (月) 09:25 (UTC)}} {{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月19日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の19日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[天智天皇]]6年（[[ユリウス暦]][[667年]][[4月17日]]） 中大兄皇子（後の[[天智天皇]]）が近江・大津京に[[遷都]] * [[崇禎]]17年/[[順治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1644年]][[4月25日]]） - [[李自成]]が率いる叛乱軍が北京を占領。[[崇禎帝]]が自害し[[明]]が滅亡 * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[4月19日]]） - [[鉄道]]建設業務を統轄する為、民部・大蔵省に[[日本の鉄道史|鉄道掛]]を設置
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1838年]][[4月13日]]） - [[後藤象二郎]]、政治家・[[自由民権運動]]家（+ [[1897年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[黄初]]4年（ユリウス暦[[223年]][[5月6日]]） - [[曹仁]]、武将（* [[168年]]） * [[赤烏]]8年（ユリウス暦[[245年]][[5月2日]]） - [[陸遜]]、武将、政治家（* [[183年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|18|3|20|2|19|4|3|0319}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 19일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月十九]][[zh:三月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q838995]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 19|qq=March 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Tianzhi Tennō]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:667|667]] [[:en:April 17|April 17]]) – Prince Nakano-Ōe (later known as [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Tianzhi Tennō]]) relocated the capital to Ōmi and Ōtsu-kyō. * {{ill|Sūtei|ja|崇禎|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sūtei|qq=|1=Chongzhen Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q833637}} 17th year / {{ill|Shunji|ja|順治|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shunji|qq=|1=Shunzhi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1077244}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – Rebel leader [[:en:Li Zicheng|Li Zicheng]] led his forces to occupy Beijing; Emperor [[:en:Chongzhen Emperor|Chongzhen]] committed suicide, marking the collapse of the Ming dynasty. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – To oversee railway construction, the Japanese government established the Railway Section within the Ministry of Civil Affairs and the Ministry of Finance.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1838|1838]] [[:en:April 13|April 13]]) – [[:en:Gotō Shōjirō|Gotō Shōjirō]], a politician and prominent figure in the Freedom and People's Rights Movement (died [[:en:1897|1897]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Huangchu|Huangchu]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:223|223]] [[:en:May 6|May 6]]) – [[:en:Cao Ren|Cao Ren]], a military commander from the Three Kingdoms period (born [[:en:168|168]]). * [[:en:Chiku|Chiku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:245|245]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – [[:en:Lu Xun (Eastern Wu)|Lu Xun]], a military commander and statesman (born [[:en:183|183]]).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Tianzhi Tennō]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:667|667]] [[:en:April 17|April 17]]) – Prince Nakano-Ōe (later known as [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Tianzhi Tennō]]) relocated the capital to Ōmi and Ōtsu-kyō. * {{ill|Sūtei|ja|崇禎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sūtei|1=Chongzhen Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q833637}} 17th year / {{ill|Shunji|ja|順治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shunji|1=Shunzhi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1077244}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – Rebel leader [[:en:Li Zicheng|Li Zicheng]] led his forces to occupy Beijing; Emperor [[:en:Chongzhen Emperor|Chongzhen]] committed suicide, marking the collapse of the Ming dynasty. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – To oversee railway construction, the Japanese government established the Railway Section within the Ministry of Civil Affairs and the Ministry of Finance.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1838|1838]] [[:en:April 13|April 13]]) – [[:en:Gotō Shōjirō|Gotō Shōjirō]], a politician and prominent figure in the Freedom and People's Rights Movement (died [[:en:1897|1897]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Huangchu|Huangchu]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:223|223]] [[:en:May 6|May 6]]) – [[:en:Cao Ren|Cao Ren]], a military commander from the Three Kingdoms period (born [[:en:168|168]]). * [[:en:Chiku|Chiku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:245|245]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – [[:en:Lu Xun (Eastern Wu)|Lu Xun]], a military commander and statesman (born [[:en:183|183]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Tianzhi Tennō]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:667|667]] [[:en:April 17|April 17]]) – Prince Nakano-Ōe (later known as [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Tianzhi Tennō]]) relocated the capital to Ōmi and Ōtsu-kyō. * {{ill|Sūtei|ja|崇禎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sūtei|1=Chongzhen Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q833637}} 17th year / {{ill|Shunji|ja|順治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shunji|1=Shunzhi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1077244}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – Rebel leader [[:en:Li Zicheng|Li Zicheng]] led his forces to occupy Beijing; Emperor [[:en:Chongzhen Emperor|Chongzhen]] committed suicide, marking the collapse of the Ming dynasty. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – To oversee railway construction, the Japanese government established the Railway Section within the Ministry of Civil Affairs and the Ministry of Finance.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1838|1838]] [[:en:April 13|April 13]]) – [[:en:Gotō Shōjirō|Gotō Shōjirō]], a politician and prominent figure in the Freedom and People's Rights Movement (died [[:en:1897|1897]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Huangchu|Huangchu]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:223|223]] [[:en:May 6|May 6]]) – [[:en:Cao Ren|Cao Ren]], a military commander from the Three Kingdoms period (born [[:en:168|168]]). * [[:en:Chiku|Chiku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:245|245]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – [[:en:Lu Xun (Eastern Wu)|Lu Xun]], a military commander and statesman (born [[:en:183|183]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Tianzhi Tennō]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:667|667]] [[:en:April 17|April 17]]) – Prince Nakano-Ōe (later known as [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Tianzhi Tennō]]) relocated the capital to Ōmi and Ōtsu-kyō. * {{ill|Sūtei|ja|崇禎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sūtei|1=Chongzhen Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q833637}} 17th year / {{ill|Shunji|ja|順治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shunji|1=Shunzhi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1077244}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – Rebel leader [[:en:Li Zicheng|Li Zicheng]] led his forces to occupy Beijing; Emperor [[:en:Chongzhen Emperor|Chongzhen]] committed suicide, marking the collapse of the Ming dynasty. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – To oversee railway construction, the Japanese government established the Railway Section within the Ministry of Civil Affairs and the Ministry of Finance.

== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Tianzhi Tennō]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:667|667]] [[:en:April 17|April 17]]) – Prince Nakano-Ōe (later known as [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Tianzhi Tennō]]) relocated the capital to Ōmi and Ōtsu-kyō. * {{ill|Sūtei|ja|崇禎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sūtei|1=Chongzhen Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q833637}} 17th year / {{ill|Shunji|ja|順治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shunji|1=Shunzhi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1077244}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – Rebel leader [[:en:Li Zicheng|Li Zicheng]] led his forces to occupy Beijing; Emperor [[:en:Chongzhen Emperor|Chongzhen]] committed suicide, marking the collapse of the Ming dynasty. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – To oversee railway construction, the Japanese government established the Railway Section within the Ministry of Civil Affairs and the Ministry of Finance.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1838|1838]] [[:en:April 13|April 13]]) – [[:en:Gotō Shōjirō|Gotō Shōjirō]], a politician and prominent figure in the Freedom and People's Rights Movement (died [[:en:1897|1897]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Huangchu|Huangchu]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:223|223]] [[:en:May 6|May 6]]) – [[:en:Cao Ren|Cao Ren]], a military commander from the Three Kingdoms period (born [[:en:168|168]]). * [[:en:Chiku|Chiku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:245|245]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – [[:en:Lu Xun (Eastern Wu)|Lu Xun]], a military commander and statesman (born [[:en:183|183]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十九]][[zh:三月十九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十九]][[zh:三月十九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十九]][[zh:三月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838995]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 19|qq=March 19}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Tianzhi Tennō]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:667|667]] [[:en:April 17|April 17]]) – Prince Nakano-Ōe (later known as [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Tianzhi Tennō]]) relocated the capital to Ōmi and Ōtsu-kyō. * {{ill|Sūtei|ja|崇禎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sūtei|1=Chongzhen Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q833637}} 17th year / {{ill|Shunji|ja|順治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shunji|1=Shunzhi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1077244}} 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1644|1644]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – Rebel leader [[:en:Li Zicheng|Li Zicheng]] led his forces to occupy Beijing; Emperor [[:en:Chongzhen Emperor|Chongzhen]] committed suicide, marking the collapse of the Ming dynasty. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – To oversee railway construction, the Japanese government established the Railway Section within the Ministry of Civil Affairs and the Ministry of Finance.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1838|1838]] [[:en:April 13|April 13]]) – [[:en:Gotō Shōjirō|Gotō Shōjirō]], a politician and prominent figure in the Freedom and People's Rights Movement (died [[:en:1897|1897]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Huangchu|Huangchu]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:223|223]] [[:en:May 6|May 6]]) – [[:en:Cao Ren|Cao Ren]], a military commander from the Three Kingdoms period (born [[:en:168|168]]). * [[:en:Chiku|Chiku]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:245|245]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – [[:en:Lu Xun (Eastern Wu)|Lu Xun]], a military commander and statesman (born [[:en:183|183]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|18|3|20|2|19|4|3|0319|qq=}}

== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|WD=Q314802|lt=Tianzhi Tennō}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|667|en|667|WD=Q30702|lt=667}} {{ill|April 17|en|April 17|WD=Q2520|lt=April 17}}) – Prince Nakano-Ōe (later known as {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|WD=Q314802|lt=Tianzhi Tennō}}) relocated the capital to Ōmi and Ōtsu-kyō. * {{ill|Sūtei|ja|崇禎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sūtei|1=Chongzhen Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q833637}} 17th year / {{ill|Shunji|ja|順治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shunji|1=Shunzhi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1077244}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1644|en|1644|WD=Q6920|lt=1644}} {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|WD=Q2531|lt=April 25}}) – Rebel leader {{ill|Li Zicheng|en|Li Zicheng|WD=Q333567|lt=Li Zicheng}} led his forces to occupy Beijing; Emperor {{ill|Chongzhen Emperor|en|Chongzhen Emperor|WD=Q10069|lt=Chongzhen}} committed suicide, marking the collapse of the Ming dynasty. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} {{ill|April 19|en|April 19|WD=Q2523|lt=April 19}}) – To oversee railway construction, the Japanese government established the Railway Section within the Ministry of Civil Affairs and the Ministry of Finance.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838}} {{ill|April 13|en|April 13|WD=Q2498|lt=April 13}}) – {{ill|Gotō Shōjirō|en|Gotō Shōjirō|WD=Q711721|lt=Gotō Shōjirō}}, a politician and prominent figure in the Freedom and People's Rights Movement (died {{ill|1897|en|1897|WD=Q7847|lt=1897}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Huangchu|en|Huangchu|WD=Q45313168|lt=Huangchu}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|223|en|223|WD=Q31243|lt=223}} {{ill|May 6|en|May 6|WD=Q2552|lt=May 6}}) – {{ill|Cao Ren|en|Cao Ren|WD=Q378439|lt=Cao Ren}}, a military commander from the Three Kingdoms period (born {{ill|168|en|168|WD=Q24916|lt=168}}). * [[:en:Chiku|Chiku]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|245|en|245|WD=Q32308|lt=245}} {{ill|May 2|en|May 2|WD=Q2545|lt=May 2}}) – {{ill|Lu Xun (Eastern Wu)|en|Lu Xun (Eastern Wu)|WD=Q378492|lt=Lu Xun}}, a military commander and statesman (born {{ill|183|en|183|WD=Q31386|lt=183}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|18|3|20|2|19|4|3|0319|qq=}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Huangchu|en|Huangchu|WD=Q45313168|lt=Huangchu}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|223|en|223|WD=Q31243|lt=223}} {{ill|May 6|en|May 6|WD=Q2552|lt=May 6}}) – {{ill|Cao Ren|en|Cao Ren|WD=Q378439|lt=Cao Ren}}, a military commander from the Three Kingdoms period (born {{ill|168|en|168|WD=Q24916|lt=168}}). * [[:en:Chiku|Chiku]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|245|en|245|WD=Q32308|lt=245}} {{ill|May 2|en|May 2|WD=Q2545|lt=May 2}}) – {{ill|Lu Xun (Eastern Wu)|en|Lu Xun (Eastern Wu)|WD=Q378492|lt=Lu Xun}}, a military commander and statesman (born {{ill|183|en|183|WD=Q31386|lt=183}}).

== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838|1=1838}} {{ill|April 13|en|April 13|WD=Q2498|lt=April 13|1=April 13}}) – {{ill|Gotō Shōjirō|en|Gotō Shōjirō|WD=Q711721|lt=Gotō Shōjirō|1=Gotō Shōjirō}}, a politician and prominent figure in the Freedom and People's Rights Movement (died {{ill|1897|en|1897|WD=Q7847|lt=1897|1=1897}}).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Huangchu|en|Huangchu|WD=Q45313168|lt=Huangchu|1=Huangchu}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|223|en|223|WD=Q31243|lt=223|1=223}} {{ill|May 6|en|May 6|WD=Q2552|lt=May 6|1=May 6}}) – {{ill|Cao Ren|en|Cao Ren|WD=Q378439|lt=Cao Ren|1=Cao Ren}}, a military commander from the Three Kingdoms period (born {{ill|168|en|168|WD=Q24916|lt=168|1=168}}). * [[:en:Chiku|Chiku]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|245|en|245|WD=Q32308|lt=245|1=245}} {{ill|May 2|en|May 2|WD=Q2545|lt=May 2|1=May 2}}) – {{ill|Lu Xun (Eastern Wu)|en|Lu Xun (Eastern Wu)|WD=Q378492|lt=Lu Xun|1=Lu Xun (Eastern Wu)}}, a military commander and statesman (born {{ill|183|en|183|WD=Q31386|lt=183|1=183}}).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
